zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela de Beauchamp於大約1290年出生在英國薩默塞特哈契時，她的父親Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset17歲，母親Joan Chenduit12歲。她於1290年與John de Meriet在英國薩默塞特梅利特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年在英國戴文享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela de Beauchamp于大约1290年出生在英国薩默塞特哈契时，她的父亲Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset17岁，母亲Joan Chenduit12岁。她于1290年与John de Meriet在英国薩默塞特梅利特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年在英国戴文享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: of uncertain derivation. It is thought in part to be a combination of elements from   Elizabeth   and   Mary ;  in part a feminine equivalent of   Elmer .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela de Beauchamp was born about 1290, in Hatch, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, was 17 and her mother, Joan Chenduit, was 12. She married John de Meriet in 1290, in Merriott, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1381, in Devon, England, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela de Beauchamp est née environ 1290, à Hatch, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Chenduit, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé John de Meriet en 1290, à Merriott, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1381, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

Sie hat 1290 in Merriott, Somerset, England John de Meriet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1381 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela de Beauchampが約1290年にイギリスソメルセトハトチで生まれた時，父Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somersetは17歳，母Joan Chenduitは12歳であった。1290年にイギリスソメルセトメリオットでJohn de Merietと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年にイギリスデボンで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela de Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 서머세트 해트치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Chenduit(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 서머세트 머리엇에서 John de Meriet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 데폰에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela de Beauchamp родилась около 1290 г. в местности хач, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Chenduit, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Meriet в 1290 г. в местности мирриотт, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1381 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.
